name: Figma
summary: Pull real Figma design data (files, components, frames) into agents for design-to-code work.
description: Read Figma files/components/frames so an agent can reference real designs when generating or reviewing UI -- closes the design-to-code gap. Uses Figma's Dev Mode MCP server. NOTE: the exact official endpoint + plan requirements are UNCONFIRMED; the setup agent verifies and wires .mcp.json at setup (no server is auto-wired on install).

requires.label: A Figma account (Dev Mode MCP may require a paid seat -- confirm) + auth
